title: Expressibility of neural quantum states: a Walsh-complexity perspective
summary: Neural quantum states are powerful variational wavefunctions, but it remains unclear which many-body states can be represented efficiently by modern additive architectures. We introduce Walsh complexity, a basis-dependent measure of how broadly a wavefunction is spread over parity patterns. States with an almost uniform Walsh spectrum require exponentially large Walsh complexity from any good approximant. We show that shallow additive feed-forward networks cannot generate such complexity in the tame regime, e.g. polynomial activations with subexponential parameter scaling. As a concrete example, we construct a simple dimerized state prepared by a single layer of disjoint controlled-$Z$ gates. Although it has only short-range entanglement and a simple tensor-network description, its Walsh complexity is maximal. Full-cube fits across system size and depth are consistent with the complexity bound: for polynomial activations, successful fitting appears only once depth reaches a logarithmic scale in $N$, whereas activation saturation in $\tanh$ produces a sharp threshold-like jump already at depth $3$. Walsh complexity therefore provides an expressibility axis complementary to entanglement and clarifies when depth becomes an essential resource for additive neural quantum states.

AI.tldr: 该论文引入Walsh复杂度作为衡量波函数在奇偶模式上分布广度的度量，证明浅层加性前馈网络无法在温和条件下生成高Walsh复杂度，为神经量子态的深度需求提供了理论依据。
AI.motivation: 神经量子态作为变分波函数很强大，但现代加性架构能高效表示哪些多体态尚不清楚。需要理解神经量子态的表达能力限制，特别是深度何时成为必要资源。
AI.method: 引入Walsh复杂度作为基依赖的度量，分析波函数在奇偶模式上的分布。构造具体的二聚化态作为例子，分析其Walsh复杂度特性。通过全立方拟合实验验证复杂度界限。
AI.result: 证明浅层加性前馈网络在温和条件下无法生成高Walsh复杂度。具体构造的二聚化态虽然只有短程纠缠和简单张量网络描述，但具有最大Walsh复杂度。实验显示多项式激活需要对数深度才能成功拟合，而tanh激活在深度3就出现阈值跳跃。
AI.conclusion: Walsh复杂度提供了与纠缠互补的表达能力轴，阐明了深度何时成为加性神经量子态的必要资源。该工作为理解神经量子态的表达能力限制提供了新视角。

title: Interface and Strain Control of Emergent Weyl Semimetallic Phase in SrNbO$_{3}$/LaFeO$_{3}$ Heterostructures
summary: Realizing correlated topological semimetallic phases in bulk transition-metal oxides remains challenging due to rigid lattice symmetry, correlation-induced gap opening, and limited structural tunability. However, complex-oxide thin films and heterostructures provide a powerful platform to stabilize topological phases by tailoring the requisite lattice symmetry through strain control and interface design. In this study, we demonstrate the emergence of Weyl-like electronic states and associated chiral transport in SrNbO$_3$ (SNO)/LaFeO$_3$ (LFO) bilayers. Transport measurements reveal signatures consistent with nontrivial topology, including large non-saturating MR, a nonlinear Hall response, and a chiral anomaly like feature in longitudinal magnetotransport under parallel electric and magnetic fields ($\mathbf{B} \parallel \mathbf{I}$). In addition, we observe a \textcolor{black}{signature} of anomalous Hall contribution, likely arising from \textcolor{black}{proximity effect induced by LFO layers at the interface}. First-principles calculations reveal an $a^0a^0c^-$ rotation pattern of the NbO$_6$ octahedra, together with interfacial lattice distortions in the SNO layer that drive the emergence of a twofold degenerate Weyl semimetallic phase protected by screw axis lattice symmetry. This is further confirmed by Berry curvature calculations, which show opposite sign Berry curvature peaks for the upper and lower band characteristic of a Weyl node. Our combined experimental and theoretical results highlight the critical role of strain and interfacial octahedral distortions in stabilizing Weyl phase in transition metal based perovskite bilayer.

AI.tldr: 在SrNbO3/LaFeO3双层结构中通过应变和界面八面体畸变实现了Weyl半金属相，实验观测到非平庸拓扑特征和手性输运
AI.motivation: 在块体过渡金属氧化物中实现相关拓扑半金属相面临晶格对称性刚性、关联诱导能隙打开和结构可调性有限等挑战，而氧化物薄膜和异质结构通过应变控制和界面设计提供了稳定拓扑相的平台
AI.method: 采用SNO/LFO双层结构，通过输运测量（包括大非饱和磁阻、非线性霍尔响应、平行电场磁场下的手性异常特征）和第一性原理计算（分析NbO6八面体旋转模式、界面晶格畸变、Berry曲率计算）相结合的方法
AI.result: 实验观测到与拓扑非平庸性一致的输运特征，理论计算揭示了a^0a^0c^-八面体旋转模式和界面畸变驱动的受螺旋轴晶格对称性保护的双重简并Weyl半金属相，Berry曲率计算显示上下能带具有相反符号的峰值特征
AI.conclusion: 应变和界面八面体畸变在稳定过渡金属基钙钛矿双层中的Weyl相中起着关键作用，为在复杂氧化物中实现拓扑相提供了新途径

title: Cascade of Classical Spin Liquids in a Bilayer Triangular-lattice Antiferromagnet Rb_2Co_2(SeO_3)_3
summary: In frustrated Ising magnets, classical spin liquids (CSLs) with macroscopic ground-state degeneracy can survive against conventional magnetic order, as exemplified by systems on triangular, kagome and pyrochlore lattices at zero field. Here we report the discovery of a high-field route toward spin liquids in a bilayer triangular lattice antiferromagnet, Rb$_2$Co$_2$(SeO$_3$)$_3$. We demonstrate that a cascade of CSLs -- characterized by doubly degenerate one-up-one-down local spin configurations and a residual entropy of 1/2(1-M/M_s)Rln2 per mole -- emerges through field-controlled dilution of Ising dimers. Owing to the interplay of intra- and inter-layer interactions, these CSLs are further stabilized by lattice symmetry breaking at fractional magnetization plateaus. Such field-induced spin liquids can be understood as a consequence of generalized ice rules, analogous to those governing in pyrochlore antiferromagnets. In particular, the 5/6-plateau state is a candidate quantum spin liquid. Our results thereby establish a new pathway for exploring diverse spin liquid states across both classical and quantum regimes.

AI.tldr: 在双层三角晶格反铁磁体Rb₂Co₂(SeO₃)₃中发现了通过高磁场诱导自旋液体的新途径，该体系在分数磁化平台处出现级联的经典自旋液体态，其中5/6平台态可能是量子自旋液体候选态。
AI.motivation: 探索在受挫伊辛磁体中实现自旋液体的新途径。传统上，三角、Kagome和烧绿石晶格在零场下可以维持经典自旋液体，但本研究旨在发现通过高磁场控制实现自旋液体的新方法。
AI.method: 研究双层三角晶格反铁磁体Rb₂Co₂(SeO₃)₃，通过磁场控制稀释伊辛二聚体，利用层内和层间相互作用的协同效应，在分数磁化平台处实现晶格对称性破缺，从而稳定自旋液体态。
AI.result: 发现了级联的经典自旋液体态，这些态具有双重简并的一上一下局域自旋构型和每摩尔1/2(1-M/M_s)Rln2的剩余熵。特别重要的是，5/6磁化平台态被确认为量子自旋液体候选态。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作建立了探索跨越经典和量子体系的自旋液体态的新途径，表明磁场诱导的自旋液体可以作为广义冰规则的结果，类似于烧绿石反铁磁体中的情况。

title: Circular dichroism in second- and third-harmonic generation in chiral topological semimetal CoSi
summary: We theoretically investigate circular dichroism (CD) in second- and third-harmonic generation (SHG and THG) in the chiral topological semimetal CoSi. We demonstrate that both SHG and THG exhibit dichroic responses of order unity, while their robustness against spectral broadening is strikingly different. Specifically, while SHG-CD is strongly suppressed by dissipation, THG-CD remains robust over a wide frequency range. We show that this qualitative difference originates from the phase structure of the nonlinear current, where SHG-CD arises from subleading interference processes that are sensitive to dephasing, whereas THG-CD emerges already at the leading nonlinear order and is therefore protected against spectral broadening. As a result, THG-CD provides a robust probe of chirality encoded in nonequilibrium electronic dynamics. We further reveal non-monotonic frequency dependences and pronounced sensitivity of harmonic emission to the polarization state and crystallographic orientation of the driving field. Our results uncover a general mechanism for robust nonlinear chiroptical responses in noncentrosymmetric quantum materials and establish high-harmonic spectroscopy as a powerful probe of phase-resolved electronic dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了手性拓扑半金属CoSi中二次和三次谐波产生的圆二色性，发现三次谐波圆二色性比二次谐波圆二色性对耗散更鲁棒，为探测非平衡电子动力学中的手性提供了新方法。
AI.motivation: 研究手性拓扑半金属中非线性光学响应的圆二色性，探索鲁棒的非线性手性光学探针，以探测材料中的手性电子动力学。
AI.method: 对CoSi手性拓扑半金属进行理论分析，研究二次谐波产生和三次谐波产生的圆二色性响应，分析非线性电流的相位结构，探讨耗散对圆二色性的影响。
AI.result: 发现SHG和THG都表现出接近1的圆二色性响应，但THG-CD对谱展宽具有鲁棒性，而SHG-CD则被耗散强烈抑制。THG-CD源于主导非线性阶次，而SHG-CD来自次主导干涉过程。
AI.conclusion: THG-CD为探测非平衡电子动力学中的手性提供了鲁棒探针，高次谐波光谱学成为探测相位分辨电子动力学的有力工具，揭示了非中心对称量子材料中鲁棒非线性手性光学响应的一般机制。

title: Generative Chemical Language Models for Energetic Materials Discovery
summary: The discovery of new energetic materials remains a pressing challenge hindered by limited availability of high-quality data. To address this, we have developed generative molecular language models that have been pretrained on extensive chemical data and then fine-tuned with curated energetic materials datasets. This transfer-learning strategy extends the chemical language model capabilities beyond the pharmacological space in which they have been predominantly developed, offering a framework applicable to other data-spare discovery problems. Furthermore, we discuss the benefits of fragment-based molecular encodings for chemical language models, in particular in constructing synthetically accessible structures. Together, these advances provide a foundation for accelerating the design of next-generation energetic materials with demanding performance requirements.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于迁移学习的生成式分子语言模型，通过预训练和微调策略解决高能材料数据稀缺问题，加速新材料设计
AI.motivation: 高能材料发现面临高质量数据稀缺的挑战，需要开发新方法来加速新材料设计
AI.method: 采用迁移学习策略：先在大量化学数据上预训练分子语言模型，然后在精选的高能材料数据集上进行微调；同时探索基于片段的分子编码方法
AI.result: 成功将化学语言模型能力扩展到药理学领域之外，为数据稀缺的发现问题提供了通用框架，并验证了片段编码在构建可合成结构中的优势
AI.conclusion: 该方法为加速设计满足高性能要求的下一代高能材料奠定了基础，其框架可推广到其他数据稀缺的发现问题

title: Enhanced Kadowaki-Woods Ratio and Weak-Coupling Superconductivity in Noncentrosymmetric YPt$_2$Si$_2$ Single Crystals
summary: Superconductivity in noncentrosymmetric RPt2Si2 (R = rare earth) compounds exhibit a rich playground to explore the competition between different ground states, such as unconventional superconductivity, antiferromagnetism and charge density wave. Here, we report the successful single crystal synthesis of noncentrosymmetric YPt2Si2 superconductor, with a transition temperature Tc = 1.67 K, via Sn flux method. The high quality of the prepared single crystals was confirmed using powder and Laue XRD measurements. The superconducting and normal state properties are investigated using electrical transport and heat capacity measurements down to 0.5 K. In the normal state, unlike LaPt2Si2, no charge density wave transition is observed in YPt2Si2, as evidenced by electrical transport and specific heat measurements. A relatively large Kadowaki-Woods ratio and a linear temperature variation of the electrical resistivity in an extended temperature range of 50-300 K suggest an unconventional normal-state in YPt2Si2. The estimated superconducting parameters indicate that YPt2Si2 is a type-II superconductor with weak electron-phonon coupling. The temperature dependence of specific heat in the superconducting state can be explained reasonably well using an isotropic two-gap model. A positive curvature near Tc in the temperature variation of upper critical field also supports the two-gap superconductivity. First-principles DFT calculations suggest a BCS-like superconducting state driven primarily by d-electron contributions. The calculated electron-phonon coupling constant identifies the material as a weak-coupling superconductor, with the McMillan-Allen-Dynes formula yielding a Tc of 1.8 K. Additionally, we provide a comparative analysis of the superconducting and normal-state properties of YPt2Si2 and compositionally similar LaPt2Si2.

AI.tldr: YPt2Si2是一种非中心对称超导体，Tc=1.67K，表现出弱耦合双能隙超导特性，与LaPt2Si2不同，没有电荷密度波转变。
AI.motivation: 研究非中心对称RPt2Si2化合物中超导、反铁磁和电荷密度波等基态之间的竞争关系，特别是探索YPt2Si2的超导特性及其与LaPt2Si2的差异。
AI.method: 采用Sn助熔剂法合成YPt2Si2单晶，通过粉末XRD和Laue XRD确认晶体质量。使用电输运和热容测量（低至0.5K）研究超导和正常态性质，并结合第一性原理DFT计算分析电子结构和电子-声子耦合。
AI.result: YPt2Si2的Tc=1.67K，为II型弱耦合超导体。正常态表现出非常规特性（大Kadowaki-Woods比，电阻线性温度依赖）。超导态符合各向同性双能隙模型，上临界场在Tc附近的正曲率支持双能隙超导。DFT计算表明BCS-like超导态主要由d电子贡献驱动，电子-声子耦合常数弱，McMillan-Allen-Dynes公式预测Tc=1.8K。
AI.conclusion: YPt2Si2是一种弱耦合双能隙超导体，与LaPt2Si2不同，没有电荷密度波转变。该材料为研究非中心对称超导体中不同基态竞争提供了重要平台。

title: A multiphysics deep energy method for fourth-order phase-field fracture with piezoresistive self-sensing
summary: Self-sensing conductive composites can reveal deformation and damage through measurable changes in electrical resistance, which makes them attractive for embedded diagnostics and learning-enabled structural health monitoring. This paper presents a physically consistent multiphysics Deep Energy Method (DEM) for brittle fracture in piezoresistive materials. The mechanical part is modeled by small-strain linear elasticity coupled to a fourth-order AT2-type phase-field fracture functional with tensile/compressive energy split and history-field irreversibility. To avoid artificial energetic mixing of mechanical and electrical quantities, the electrical problem is treated as a one-way coupled sensing subproblem: after solving the mechanics--fracture problem, the electric potential is obtained from a steady conduction problem whose conductivity depends on strain through a linearized piezoresistive law and on damage through a crack-induced conductivity degradation. The resulting formulation predicts crack evolution together with its resistance signature without assigning the electrical field an artificial crack-driving role. DEM is used to minimize the variational subproblems over admissible neural trial spaces with exact imposition of essential boundary conditions. A lean verification suite is used to validate the electrical building blocks and the fracture engine separately, followed by a numerical study of a tensile plate with stress concentrators and electrodes. In that study, the framework captures a nontrivial sensing regime in which appreciable damage growth leaves the global resistance nearly unchanged, followed by a sharp resistance increase once dominant conductive ligaments are disrupted and current paths reorganize strongly.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理一致的多物理场深度能量方法(DEM)，用于压阻材料的脆性断裂分析，将力学断裂与电阻传感解耦，通过神经网络变分求解预测裂纹演化及其电阻特征。
AI.motivation: 自感知导电复合材料通过电阻变化揭示变形和损伤，在嵌入式诊断和结构健康监测中具有应用潜力。现有方法存在机械与电学量人工能量混合的问题，需要物理一致的建模方法。
AI.method: 采用多物理场深度能量方法(DEM)：力学部分使用小应变线弹性耦合AT2型相场断裂模型；电学部分作为单向耦合传感子问题处理，电导率通过线性化压阻定律依赖于应变，通过裂纹诱导电导率退化依赖于损伤。使用神经网络变分空间最小化变分子问题，精确施加本质边界条件。
AI.result: 方法验证了电学构建块和断裂引擎的准确性。数值研究表明，框架能够捕捉非平凡的传感机制：显著损伤增长时全局电阻几乎不变，当主导导电韧带断裂、电流路径重组时电阻急剧增加。
AI.conclusion: 提出的物理一致DEM框架成功预测了压阻材料中裂纹演化及其电阻特征，避免了电学场对裂纹驱动的人工作用，为自感知复合材料的损伤监测提供了有效工具。

title: Constructing a Quantum Twisting Microscope: Design Insights and Experimental Considerations
comment: The first two authors contributed equally
summary: We report the details of construction and testing of a Quantum Twisting Microscope, a recently developed scanning probe instrument that enables twist angle dependent electronic measurements on layered materials. Our implementation is based on a commercial atomic force microscope whose open geometry beneath the scan head allows integration of the rotation and translation stages required for QTM operation. We describe the complete fabrication process including tip preparation by focused ion beam deposition and graphite transfer, custom stage assembly with integrated rotation capability, and multistep alignment procedures. To validate the instrument, we perform conductance measurements between graphite layers as a function of twist angle, observing clear 60 degree periodicity consistent with the hexagonal lattice symmetry and conductance enhancements near the commensurate twist angles of 21.8 and 38.2 degrees. These results confirm the instruments ability to resolve crystallographic twist angle dependent transport features. By providing detailed construction and operational guidelines, we aim to make QTM technology accessible to research groups with standard AFM infrastructure, enabling investigations of twist angle dependent phenomena in van der Waals materials, complex oxide heterostructures and chiral systems.

AI.tldr: 量子扭转显微镜的构建与测试细节，这是一种新型扫描探针仪器，用于测量层状材料中扭转角依赖的电子特性
AI.motivation: 开发一种能够测量层状材料中扭转角依赖电子特性的新型扫描探针仪器，使研究团队能够利用标准原子力显微镜基础设施研究扭转角相关现象
AI.method: 基于商用原子力显微镜构建量子扭转显微镜，包括：1）通过聚焦离子束沉积和石墨转移制备探针；2）组装具有集成旋转功能的定制平台；3）多步对准程序；4）进行石墨层间电导测量作为扭转角函数
AI.result: 观察到石墨层间电导的60度周期性，与六方晶格对称性一致，并在21.8度和38.2度等共格扭转角附近观察到电导增强，证实了仪器解析晶体学扭转角依赖传输特征的能力
AI.conclusion: 量子扭转显微镜技术能够使具有标准AFM基础设施的研究团队研究范德华材料、复杂氧化物异质结构和手性系统中的扭转角依赖现象

title: Non-reciprocal Ising gauge theory
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures; Supplement in ancillary files section
summary: Non-reciprocity and geometric frustration enable many-body systems to avoid crystalline order and instead exhibit complex, liquid-like behavior. Here we show that their interplay is richer than the sum of its parts, leading to surprising structural and dynamical phenomena. In our minimal model, two copies of Ising gauge theory are non-reciprocally coupled in a way that crucially preserves a local $\mathbb{Z}_2$ symmetry. We discover that the combined Wilson loop observable of the two copies exhibits linear asymptotic scaling, with a quasiparticle-pair confinement length tuned by the strength of the non-reciprocal coupling. Key dynamical features are revealed in the behavior of individual deconfined excitations due to strong interactions induced by the non-reciprocity, leading to motion on a critical percolation cluster that follows a self-avoiding trail. Mapping from this quasiparticle dynamics onto the magnetic noise spectrum, we discover that non-reciprocity tunes topological logarithmic contributions and causes long-lived metastable states due to quasiparticle trapping. Our work opens the way for broader investigations of geometrically frustrated non-reciprocity.

AI.tldr: 非互易耦合与几何阻挫的Ising规范理论模型，揭示了新型准粒子约束、临界渗流动力学和拓扑对数贡献等新奇现象
AI.motivation: 探索非互易性与几何阻挫的相互作用如何超越各自单独效应，产生新颖的结构和动力学现象，为研究几何阻挫非互易性开辟新途径
AI.method: 构建两个Ising规范理论副本的非互易耦合模型，保持局部Z2对称性，研究组合Wilson环观测量的线性渐近标度，分析准粒子动力学与临界渗流簇上的自回避轨迹运动
AI.result: 发现组合Wilson环呈现线性渐近标度，准粒子对约束长度由非互易耦合强度调节；准粒子在临界渗流簇上遵循自回避轨迹运动；非互易性调节拓扑对数贡献并导致准粒子陷获的长寿命亚稳态
AI.conclusion: 非互易性与几何阻挫的相互作用产生丰富物理现象，包括新型约束、临界动力学和拓扑效应，为几何阻挫非互易性研究开辟了新方向

title: Microwave-to-optical transduction using magnon-exciton coupling in a layered antiferromagnet
summary: Coherent interfaces between microwave-frequency quantum systems and low-loss optical links are essential for quantum networks. However, existing microwave-optical transducers often trade conversion efficiency against added noise, bandwidth, and device integrability. Here, we demonstrate coherent microwave-to-optical transduction based on magnon-exciton coupling in the layered antiferromagnet CrSBr. Driving the antiferromagnetic resonance with microwave signals imprints coherent modulation on a reflected optical probe, generating optical sidebands that are resonantly enhanced near excitonic transitions. While prior magnon-based approaches to microwave-to-optical transduction have typically relied on intrinsically weak off-resonant magneto-optical effects (e.g., Faraday rotation), our scheme exploits strong light-matter interactions at exciton resonances. Even in a bulk crystal without cavity enhancement, we observe coherent conversion over an intrinsically broadband window of ~ 300 MHz. We further show that multiple exciton-polariton resonances inherit the magnon-coupled response, suggesting a route to broaden the usable optical detuning range and to mitigate optical dissipation. Our results establish magnon-coupled excitons in layered magnets as a scalable platform for broadband microwave-optical interfaces, with pathways to higher cooperativity via reduced magnetic volume and cavity integration.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了一种基于层状反铁磁体CrSBr中磁振子-激子耦合的新型微波-光转换器，利用激子共振处的强光-物质相互作用实现宽带相干转换。
AI.motivation: 现有微波-光转换器通常在转换效率、附加噪声、带宽和设备集成度之间进行权衡，需要开发更优的转换方案以实现量子网络所需的相干接口。
AI.method: 利用层状反铁磁体CrSBr中的磁振子-激子耦合，通过微波信号驱动反铁磁共振，在反射光学探针上产生相干调制，在激子跃迁附近产生共振增强的光学边带。
AI.result: 在没有腔增强的体晶体中观察到约300 MHz的宽带相干转换窗口，多个激子-极化激元共振继承了磁振子耦合响应，为拓宽可用光学失谐范围和减轻光学耗散提供了途径。
AI.conclusion: 层状磁体中磁振子耦合的激子为宽带微波-光接口提供了一个可扩展平台，通过减小磁体积和腔集成可实现更高的协同性。

title: Interplay of Anisotropy, Dzyaloshinskii Moriya Interaction and Symmetry breaking Fields in a 2D XY Ferromagnet
summary: A two dimensional ferromagnetic XY model with its bound vortex-antivortex dominated quasi long range ordered phase at low temperatures is a long standing as well as well studied problem of interest in the field of condensed matter. We conduct a detailed Monte Carlo study of such model with rather unexplored extensions where additional anisotropic exchange coupling and Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions (DMI) together affect the Kosterlitz-Thoulass (KT) transition in presence/absence of symmetry breaking fields. Without DMI, the exchange term promotes collinear (ferromagnetic) order, whereas the DMI term induces spin cantings. By tuning anisotropy upto Ising limit, we document energy, specific-heat, magnetizations as well as helicity modulus and vortex densities for different tempeatures and DMI strength. We also compute the 2nd moment of correlation lengths in order to probe the spatial correlation of the spins. Furthermore, the effect of U(1) symmetry breaking 4-fold and 8-fold symmetric h4 and h8 fields are explored which shows how the double-peaked specific heat profiles changes in presence of DMI. Overall, our findings append many important updates in the low temperature phases of a topological XY ferromagnet when additional DMI and isotropy-breaking exchange and/or field terms are considered and thus providing a practical blueprint for suitably engineering topological spin systems.

AI.tldr: 二维XY铁磁模型在低温和DMI作用下的蒙特卡洛研究，揭示了各向异性交换耦合和DMI对KT相变的影响，以及对称破缺场对拓扑自旋系统的调控作用。
AI.motivation: 研究二维XY铁磁模型中涡旋-反涡旋对主导的准长程有序相，探索各向异性交换耦合和Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用（DMI）对Kosterlitz-Thoulass（KT）相变的影响，特别是在对称破缺场存在/不存在的情况下。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛模拟方法，研究具有各向异性交换耦合和DMI的二维XY铁磁模型。通过调节各向异性至Ising极限，计算能量、比热、磁化强度、螺旋模量、涡旋密度等物理量随温度和DMI强度的变化。同时计算关联长度的二阶矩以探测自旋的空间关联性，并研究U(1)对称破缺的4重和8重对称场h4和h8的影响。
AI.result: 发现无DMI时交换项促进共线（铁磁）有序，而DMI项诱导自旋倾斜。通过调节各向异性，观察到比热双峰结构在DMI存在下的变化。研究结果为拓扑XY铁磁体的低温相提供了重要更新，揭示了DMI和各向异性交换耦合对拓扑自旋系统的调控机制。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解二维XY铁磁模型中DMI和各向异性交换耦合对KT相变的影响提供了全面分析，展示了对称破缺场对拓扑自旋系统的调控作用，为工程化设计拓扑自旋系统提供了实用蓝图。

title: Universal Scaling and Many-Body Resurrection of Polaritonic Double-Quantum Coherences
summary: The ultrafast nonlinear optical response of molecular ensembles is fundamentally altered under strong light-matter coupling. To rigorously isolate the genuine many-body contributions, an exact time-domain field-subtraction protocol is developed within a fully non-perturbative Maxwell-Liouville framework explicitly incorporating the two-exciton manifold in real space and time. This approach reveals that while collective cavity delocalization drives the macroscopic nonlinear signal toward a severe harmonic cancellation (an effect termed "spectral starvation"), intrinsic many-body molecular interactions robustly resurrect genuine polaritonic double-quantum coherences (DQCs). This many-body resurrection is governed by a universal two-photon matching rule, $Δ_B + 4J = Ω_R$, linking molecular anharmonicity ($Δ_B$) to the macroscopic Rabi splitting ($Ω_R$) and excitonic coupling ($J$). Crucially, this dictates that J-aggregates ($J < 0$) uniquely isolate the resonant many-body state below the dense two-exciton scattering continuum, protecting the macroscopic coherence from spatial fragmentation. This predictive framework establishes a direct phase diagram to engineer and protect optical nonlinearities across diverse strongly coupled platforms.

AI.tldr: 强光-物质耦合下分子系综的超快非线性光学响应发生根本改变。研究开发了精确的时域场减除协议，揭示集体腔离域导致宏观非线性信号严重谐波抵消（"光谱饥饿"），而内在多体分子相互作用则恢复真正的极化子双量子相干性。
AI.motivation: 在强光-物质耦合条件下，分子系综的超快非线性光学响应会发生根本性变化。需要严格分离真实的多体贡献，以理解集体腔效应与内在分子相互作用的竞争机制。
AI.method: 开发了完全非微扰的Maxwell-Liouville框架中的精确时域场减除协议，明确包含实空间和时间的双激子流形。该方法能够严格分离集体腔效应和内在多体相互作用。
AI.result: 发现集体腔离域导致宏观非线性信号严重谐波抵消（"光谱饥饿"），而内在多体分子相互作用则恢复真正的极化子双量子相干性。这一多体重生受普遍双光子匹配规则Δ_B + 4J = Ω_R支配，其中J-聚集体（J < 0）能独特地隔离共振多体态，保护宏观相干性免受空间碎片化影响。
AI.conclusion: 该预测性框架建立了直接的相图，可用于在多种强耦合平台中工程化和保护光学非线性。特别指出J-聚集体在保护宏观相干性方面的独特优势，为设计非线性光学器件提供了理论指导。

title: Genuine pair density wave order on the kagome lattice
summary: The pair density wave (PDW) is a novel superconducting state with non-zero center-of-mass momentum Cooper pairing in the absence of external magnetic fields. Its realization in microscopic models as the ground state is very rare and extremely challenging, because a genuine PDW state is free of a uniform component or modulations by a pre-existing spin/charge density wave order at the same wavevector. Here, we report the discovery of a genuine primary PDW phase in a two-orbital Hubbard model on the kagome lattice by state-of-art functional renormalization group studies. It emerges out of competing orders over a wide physical parameter range suitable for realistic material realizations. The key ingredients in favor of the PDW order are the strongly sublattice and orbital polarized Bloch states on multiple Fermi pockets. They force the zero-momentum Cooper pairing to involve the same sublattices and be suppressed by onsite Coulomb repulsion, while pairing between different sublattices to be dominated by different Fermi pockets with nonzero total momentum. The degenerate PDW states at three momenta ${\bf M}_{1,2,3}$ on the Brillouin zone boundary exhibit novel intertwined order and can linearly combine into topologically nontrivial chiral PDW states. We propose that the model can be realized in multiorbital kagome materials such as CsCr$_3$Sb$_5$ as well as cold atom systems.

AI.tldr: 在Kagome晶格的双轨道Hubbard模型中发现了真正的配对密度波（PDW）基态，这是在没有外磁场下具有非零质心动量Cooper配对的超导态。
AI.motivation: 配对密度波（PDW）是一种新颖的超导态，但在微观模型中作为基态实现非常罕见且极具挑战性，因为真正的PDW态不包含均匀分量或由预先存在的自旋/电荷密度波序调制。
AI.method: 使用最先进的泛函重整化群方法研究Kagome晶格上的双轨道Hubbard模型，分析竞争序在广泛物理参数范围内的出现。
AI.result: 发现了真正的初级PDW相，其关键要素是多个费米口袋上强烈的亚晶格和轨道极化Bloch态。这些态迫使零动量Cooper配对涉及相同亚晶格并被在位库仑排斥抑制，而不同亚晶格间的配对则由具有非零总动量的不同费米口袋主导。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可以在多轨道Kagome材料（如CsCr3Sb5）以及冷原子系统中实现，为实验观测PDW态提供了理论平台。

title: Integrating Gaussian Random Functions with Genetic Algorithms for the Optimization of Functionally Graded Lattice Structures
summary: The properties of lattice-based structures can be enhanced by varying their geometric parameters in a graded manner, and the gradation can be tailored to extremize a particular objective. In this manuscript, we propose a non-gradient-based optimization framework to find the tailor-made graded profiles for lattice-based structures. The key challenge addressed in the work is to ensure the graded nature/smoothness of the underlying structure in a non-gradient-based optimization scheme. As we demonstrate in the manuscript, the conventional implementation of the genetic algorithm provides structures with abrupt changes, leading to issues such as stress concentration. In this work, we propose a Gaussian random function (GRF)/Gaussian process regression (GPR) integrated genetic algorithm to obtain an optimal graded lattice profile for a given objective. The integration of the GRF/GPR along with a projection operator ensures the smoothness of the designs at each stage of the optimization. We present several numerical examples to demonstrate that the proposed framework provides smoother designs that are less susceptible to stress concentration, while ensuring satisfaction of the underlying objective.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于高斯随机函数/高斯过程回归的非梯度优化框架，用于设计平滑的梯度晶格结构，避免传统遗传算法产生的突变问题。
AI.motivation: 梯度晶格结构可以通过几何参数的变化来增强性能，但传统非梯度优化方法（如遗传算法）会产生突变设计，导致应力集中等问题。需要一种能确保结构平滑性的非梯度优化框架。
AI.method: 提出集成高斯随机函数（GRF）和高斯过程回归（GPR）的遗传算法，结合投影算子确保优化过程中每个阶段的设计都具有平滑性。
AI.result: 数值示例表明，所提框架能产生更平滑的设计，减少应力集中，同时满足优化目标要求。
AI.conclusion: GRF/GPR集成的遗传算法能有效获得平滑的梯度晶格结构，解决了传统非梯度优化中的突变问题，为梯度晶格结构设计提供了可靠框架。

title: An argument why the Spinterface model cannot explain the chirality induced spin selectivity effect
summary: In the context of chirality induced spin selectivity effect, it has been argued that a chiral molecule when adsorbed on a metal facilitates the formation of a local spin moment at the interface between the metal and molecule, given a strong spin-orbit coupling in the metal. The possibility for such spin moment formation is analyzed in terms of general arguments and effective modeling of a pertinent set-up. The conclusion from this analysis is that a strong spin-orbit coupling in the metal does not provide a sufficient mechanism to sustain a stabilized spin moment at the interface. It is, moreover, shown that an electron flux in to or out from the molecule does not provide conditions for a spin moment formation, regardless of whether the flux is spin-polarized or not.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析手性分子吸附在金属表面时，强自旋轨道耦合是否足以在界面形成稳定局域自旋矩，结论是否定的。
AI.motivation: 研究手性诱导自旋选择性效应中，手性分子吸附在金属表面时，金属的强自旋轨道耦合是否足以在界面形成局域自旋矩。
AI.method: 采用一般性论证和有效模型方法，分析相关实验装置中自旋矩形成的可能性。
AI.result: 分析表明：金属的强自旋轨道耦合不足以维持界面稳定自旋矩；电子流入或流出分子（无论是否自旋极化）也不提供自旋矩形成的条件。
AI.conclusion: 强自旋轨道耦合不是形成界面稳定自旋矩的充分机制，需要其他物理机制来解释手性诱导自旋选择性效应。

title: Random matrix theory of integrability-to-chaos transition
summary: The statistics of gaps between quantum energy levels is a hallmark criterion in quantum chaos and quantum integrability studies. The relevant distributions corresponding to exactly integrable vs. fully chaotic systems are universal and described by the Poisson vs. Wigner-Dyson curves. In the transitional regime between integrability and chaos, the distributions are much less universal and have not been understood quantitatively until now. We point out that the relevant statistics that controls these distributions is that of the matrix elements of the nonintegrable perturbation Hamiltonian in the energy eigenbasis of the unperturbed integrable system. With this insight, we formulate a simple random matrix ensemble that correctly reproduces the level spacing distributions in a variety of test systems. For the distribution of matrix elements appearing in our construction, we furthermore discover surprising universal features: across a variety of physical systems with diverse degrees of freedom, these distributions are dominated by simple power laws.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于微扰矩阵元统计的随机矩阵模型，能够定量描述可积与混沌过渡区的能级间距分布，并发现微扰矩阵元分布具有普适的幂律特征。
AI.motivation: 量子能级间距统计是区分量子混沌与可积系统的关键判据，但可积与混沌过渡区的分布缺乏普适性且未被定量理解，需要新的理论框架来描述这一过渡区域。
AI.method: 提出微扰矩阵元统计是控制过渡区能级间距分布的关键因素，构建了一个简单的随机矩阵系综，该系综基于未受扰可积系统能量本征基下非可积微扰哈密顿量的矩阵元分布。
AI.result: 该随机矩阵模型成功再现了多种测试系统的能级间距分布，并发现微扰矩阵元分布具有普适的幂律特征，这一特征在不同物理系统中普遍存在。
AI.conclusion: 通过关注微扰矩阵元统计，建立了定量描述可积-混沌过渡区能级间距分布的理论框架，揭示了微扰矩阵元分布的普适幂律行为，为理解量子混沌过渡区提供了新视角。

title: Design A Family of 2D Nb-Based Multilayer Kagome Semimetals with High Fermi Velocity and Low Thermal Conductivity
summary: Although two-dimensional (2D) multilayer kagome materials have opened up new windows of opportunity for exploring novel physical properties, their development has been constrained by the scarcity of available material systems. In light of this, in this study, relying on our previously proposed innovative "1+3" design strategy for multilayer kagome materials, we have successfully designed nine stable 2D niobium-based multilayer kagome monolayers with tunable compositions: Nb<sub>6</sub>Cl<sub>2</sub>S<sub>3</sub>Br<sub>6</sub>, Nb<sub>6</sub>Cl<sub>2</sub>S<sub>4</sub>Br<sub>6</sub>, Nb<sub>6</sub>Cl<sub>2</sub>Se<sub>3</sub>Br<sub>6</sub>, Nb<sub>6</sub>Cl<sub>2</sub>Se<sub>4</sub>Br<sub>6</sub>, Nb<sub>6</sub>Cl<sub>2</sub>S<sub>1</sub>Se<sub>3</sub>Br<sub>6</sub>, Nb<sub>6</sub>Cl<sub>2</sub>S<sub>3</sub>Se<sub>1</sub>Br<sub>6</sub>, Nb<sub>6</sub>S<sub>4</sub>Cl<sub>8</sub>, Nb<sub>6</sub>Se<sub>4</sub>Br<sub>8</sub>, and Nb<sub>6</sub>Br<sub>2</sub>S<sub>3</sub>Se<sub>1</sub>Cl<sub>6</sub>. These nine new materials all belong to the category of Dirac semimetals, with their Dirac cone structures primarily arising from the dz<sup>2</sup> orbitals based on Nb-based kagome lattice. Hybrid functional calculations reveal that these materials boast Fermi velocities as high as 2.36-3.04*10<sup>5</sup> m/s. Moreover, these materials generally exhibit characteristics of relatively low phonon group velocities and shorted phonon lifetimes. Under room temperature conditions, they possess comparatively low lattice thermal conductivities, with values ranging from 1.704-8.149 Wm<sup>-1</sup>K<sup>-1</sup> . Our research not only robustly confirms the feasibility of the "1+3" multilayer kagome lattices design strategy in the realm of kagome material development but also sets an exemplary benchmark for the study of Nb-based multilayer kagome materials.

AI.tldr: 基于"1+3"设计策略成功设计了9种稳定的二维铌基多层kagome单层材料，均为狄拉克半金属，具有高费米速度和低晶格热导率特性。
AI.motivation: 二维多层kagome材料在探索新颖物理性质方面具有巨大潜力，但现有材料体系稀缺，限制了其发展。本研究旨在通过创新的设计策略扩展这类材料库。
AI.method: 采用先前提出的"1+3"多层kagome材料设计策略，设计了9种铌基多层kagome单层材料，通过杂化泛函计算分析其电子结构和热输运性质。
AI.result: 成功设计了9种稳定的二维铌基多层kagome单层材料，均为狄拉克半金属，费米速度高达2.36-3.04×10^5 m/s，室温下晶格热导率较低（1.704-8.149 Wm^-1K^-1）。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实了"1+3"多层kagome晶格设计策略的可行性，为铌基多层kagome材料研究设立了基准，扩展了二维kagome材料体系。

title: The optical Su-Schrieffer-Heeger model on a triangular lattice
summary: We study the triangular lattice optical Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) model using determinant quantum Monte Carlo. By varying the model's carrier concentration, electron-phonon coupling strength, and phonon energy $Ω$, we identify two doping regimes of interest. At one-quarter filling ($\langle n\rangle = 0.5$), corresponding to the case of a circular noninteracting Fermi surface, we find evidence for a metal to insulating bond-order-wave (BOW) phase transition that breaks a local $C_6$ rotational symmetry. Conversely, at three-quarters filling ($\langle n\rangle = 1.5$), corresponding to a hexagonal Fermi surface, we find evidence for transitions to another BOW phase for small $Ω$ and an $s$-wave superconducting phase for sufficiently large $Ω$. This tendency toward pairing appears to be associated with the possibility of a sign change in the effective intersite hopping, which can occur for sufficiently large lattice displacements. We also find no evidence for enhanced magnetic correlations in the model, contrary to what has been reported for square lattice SSH models.

AI.tldr: 三角晶格光学SSH模型中，通过改变载流子浓度、电子-声子耦合强度和声子能量，发现两个有趣的掺杂区域：四分之一填充时出现金属到绝缘体键序波相变，四分之三填充时根据声子能量大小分别出现键序波相或s波超导相。
AI.motivation: 研究三角晶格光学SSH模型中的电子-声子相互作用，探索不同掺杂浓度下可能出现的相变和有序相，特别是与方晶格SSH模型相比的差异。
AI.method: 使用行列式量子蒙特卡洛方法，通过调节载流子浓度（填充因子）、电子-声子耦合强度和声子能量Ω，系统研究三角晶格光学SSH模型。
AI.result: 在四分之一填充（⟨n⟩=0.5）时，观察到金属到绝缘体键序波相变，破坏了局部C6旋转对称性；在四分之三填充（⟨n⟩=1.5）时，小Ω下出现键序波相，大Ω下出现s波超导相。配对倾向与有效格点间跃迁的符号变化相关。与方晶格SSH模型不同，未发现增强的磁关联。
AI.conclusion: 三角晶格光学SSH模型在不同掺杂浓度下展现出丰富的相行为，包括键序波和超导相，这些相变与费米面几何形状和声子能量密切相关，且与方晶格模型存在显著差异。

title: FermiLink: A Unified Agent Framework for Multidomain Autonomous Scientific Simulations
comment: Simulation data available at https://www.taoeli.org/publications; source code available at Github https://github.com/TaoELi/FermiLink
summary: Artificial-intelligence (AI) agent frameworks have been developed for autonomous scientific simulations, but most current agent frameworks are tailored to a single or a small set of software packages. Herein, FermiLink, a unified and extensible open-source agent framework is introduced for multidomain scientific simulations. Its key design principle is the separation of package knowledge bases from simulation workflows, so that simulation workflows in FermiLink, from figure-level simulations to full-paper-level research on high-performance computing clusters, operate uniformly among supported packages via a four-layer progressive disclosure mechanism. Using OpenAI Codex as the agent provider, the capabilities of FermiLink are demonstrated across approximately 50 scientific software packages spanning nine research domains from physics to engineering. Systematic benchmarks on 132 real-world figure-level reproduction tasks with 44 packages show that FermiLink reproduces 74 (56.1%) of published figures with simulations, among which 30 achieve high-fidelity agreement and 35 reach qualitative agreement with the target figures. A smaller set of human expert-guided reproduction benchmarks with 10 packages further highlights the importance of expert insights for improving the simulation fidelity. Beyond reproduction, a single-blinded study demonstrates that FermiLink can produce research-grade results on unpublished polariton physics problems when provided with sufficiently detailed research objectives and source code, even in the absence of external documentation or tutorials. Overall, FermiLink provides a scalable research infrastructure that may accelerate the path from scientific questions to computational results across diverse domains.

AI.tldr: FermiLink是一个统一、可扩展的开源AI代理框架，用于多领域科学模拟，通过分离软件包知识库与模拟工作流，支持约50个科学软件包，在132个真实世界图级复现任务中成功复现56.1%的已发表图表。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数AI代理框架仅针对单一或少量软件包设计，缺乏统一的多领域科学模拟框架。需要开发一个能够跨多个研究领域和软件包工作的通用框架，以加速从科学问题到计算结果的转化过程。
AI.method: 采用分离软件包知识库与模拟工作流的设计原则，通过四层渐进披露机制，使模拟工作流在支持的软件包中统一运行。使用OpenAI Codex作为代理提供者，框架支持约50个科学软件包，涵盖物理到工程等9个研究领域。
AI.result: 在132个真实世界图级复现任务中，FermiLink成功复现了74个（56.1%）已发表图表，其中30个达到高保真一致，35个达到定性一致。单盲研究显示，即使在没有外部文档的情况下，FermiLink也能在未发表的极化子物理问题上产生研究级结果。
AI.conclusion: FermiLink提供了一个可扩展的研究基础设施，能够加速跨多个领域的科学问题到计算结果的转化过程。专家洞察对于提高模拟保真度至关重要，该框架展示了AI代理在多领域科学模拟中的潜力。

title: Analytical evaluation of surface barrier and resistance in iron-based superconducting multilayers for Superconducting Radio-Frequency applications
summary: New superconducting materials, particularly iron-based superconductors (IBS), have recently attracted attention for their potential applications in particle detectors and accelerators. This paper discusses the application of these materials in multilayer structures for radio-frequency resonators used to accelerate charged particles, with the aim of improving performance compared to bulk niobium. These materials are compared with previously studied multilayers composed of conventional superconductors in terms of the maximum magnetic field they can withstand, their surface resistance, and their power loss per unit surface area. Finally, perspectives and future applications aimed at increasing operating temperatures are discussed.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨铁基超导材料在射频谐振器多层结构中的应用，旨在提升粒子加速器性能，替代传统铌材料
AI.motivation: 铁基超导体因其在粒子探测器和加速器中的潜在应用而受到关注，需要开发性能优于传统铌材料的射频谐振器结构
AI.method: 研究铁基超导材料在多层结构中的应用，与传统超导体多层结构进行对比分析，评估最大磁场承受能力、表面电阻和单位面积功率损耗等关键参数
AI.result: 论文比较了铁基超导体与传统超导体多层结构的性能差异，为射频谐振器设计提供了材料选择依据
AI.conclusion: 铁基超导材料在射频谐振器多层结构中具有应用前景，未来研究方向包括提高工作温度以扩大实际应用范围

title: From Wave Scattering to Bloch Bands: A Time-Domain Approach to Band Formation in Periodic Media
summary:
Band formation in periodic media is a central topic in undergraduate solid-state physics, typically introduced through Bloch's theorem as an eigenvalue problem in reciprocal space for infinitely periodic systems. While mathematically elegant, this formulation can appear abstract: it assumes an idealized infinite lattice, shifts attention away from real-space wave dynamics, and presents band structures as static results rather than emergent consequences of wave propagation. Consequently, students often struggle to relate band gaps to familiar physical phenomena such as reflection, transmission, and interference, leading to a disconnect between formal band theory and observable wave behavior.
  We present a computational framework that addresses this gap by reconstructing band formation directly from time-domain wave propagation in finite periodic systems. Using a staggered-grid finite-difference time-domain scheme for elastic waves, a broadband excitation is propagated through a layered medium to obtain its transmission spectrum. From this, students extract the Bloch dispersion relation and observe spatial attenuation in band-gap regions, revealing the roles of multiple scattering and phase coherence. This approach provides a physically transparent pathway to band theory and enables exploration of finite-size effects, disorder, and defect-localized modes within a unified computational framework. Implemented through compact code and guided exercises, the method offers an accessible and versatile pedagogical tool, while also equipping students with transferable skills in numerical modeling of wave phenomena across disciplines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于时域波传播的计算框架，通过有限周期性系统中的波传播直接重构能带形成，为固体物理教学提供更物理直观的能带理论教学方法。
AI.motivation: 传统Bloch定理在倒易空间中处理无限周期系统，虽然数学优雅但过于抽象。学生难以将能带间隙与反射、透射、干涉等实际物理现象联系起来，导致形式化的能带理论与可观测波行为之间存在脱节。
AI.method: 采用交错网格有限差分时域方案处理弹性波，在分层介质中传播宽带激励以获得透射谱。学生从中提取Bloch色散关系，观察带隙区域的空间衰减，揭示多重散射和相位相干的作用。
AI.result: 该方法提供了物理透明的能带理论学习路径，能够在统一计算框架内探索有限尺寸效应、无序和缺陷局域模式。通过紧凑代码和指导性练习实现，成为易用且多功能的教学工具。
AI.conclusion: 该计算框架通过时域波传播直接重构能带形成，弥合了形式化能带理论与实际物理现象之间的差距，同时培养学生跨学科波现象数值建模的可迁移技能。

title: Quantum exciton solid with embedded electron-hole solids in double-layer WSe2
summary: We studied double-layer WSe2 stacked on opposite sides of thin layers of hexagonal Boron nitride with different densities of electrons and holes. For a fixed hole density, the Coulomb drag resistance is found to exhibit plateaus approximately equal to $-h/(4e^2)$ and $-h/(2e^2)$ as the electron density is changed. When the number of electrons is equal to the number of holes, an exciton solid forms whose transport of quantum edge defects gives rise to the drag resistance. When the electron and hole densities are different, the excess electrons form a solid embedded in the exciton solid. The Coulomb drag resistance of the exciton solid comes from the one-dimensional transport of the two lowest energy channels of quantum edge vacancy-interstitial pairs. This corresponds to the first plateau. With the embedded solid, one of these channels is blocked. This corresponds to the second plateau. Transport experiments in the Corbino geometry with no edges and extra heavier holes were carried out. The plateaus disappeared. Three peaks in the resistance at different hole densities were observed. We interpret that the three peaks correspond to the commensurate exciton and two classes of hole solids. We performed phonon calculations of these states and found that the stability of these exciton-based quantum solids shows good agreement with experiment. Our results establish classes of extreme quantum solid states, opening additional avenues for the study of strongly correlated quantum transport phenomena involving quantum defect states.

AI.tldr: 双层WSe2/hBN异质结中观察到库仑拖曳电阻平台，对应激子固体及其量子边缘缺陷的输运，揭示了极端量子固体态的存在。
AI.motivation: 研究双层WSe2/hBN异质结中不同电子和空穴密度下的强关联量子输运现象，探索激子固体及其量子缺陷态的物理特性。
AI.method: 使用双层WSe2堆叠在hBN薄层两侧，调控电子和空穴密度，测量库仑拖曳电阻；采用Corbino几何结构消除边缘效应；进行声子计算验证稳定性。
AI.result: 观察到库仑拖曳电阻平台约为-h/(4e²)和-h/(2e²)；激子固体形成时量子边缘缺陷输运导致第一个平台；嵌入固体时一个通道被阻塞导致第二个平台；Corbino结构中平台消失，出现三个电阻峰。
AI.conclusion: 发现了激子基量子固体态的新类别，为研究涉及量子缺陷态的强关联量子输运现象开辟了新途径。

title: Description of KPZ interface growth by stochastic Loewner evolution
summary: In this study, we investigate the relationship between the one-dimensional (1D) Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) equation and the stochastic Loewner equation (SLE), which is a one parameter family of the conformal mappings involving stochasticity. The author shows the correspondence between 1D KPZ equation with height function $h(x,t)=(3t^2x+x^3)/6t$ and Loewner equation driven by a nonlinear stochastic process, wherein the 1D dynamics of interface growth is characterized by Loewner entropy $S_{Loew}\simeq-\ln{t/κ}$. These results were numerically verified with discussions in relation to the universality in non-equilibrium statistical physics.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了一维KPZ方程与随机Loewner方程(SLE)之间的对应关系，建立了界面生长动力学与共形映射随机过程之间的联系。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索非平衡统计物理中的普适性，特别是将描述界面生长的一维KPZ方程与描述随机共形映射的SLE理论联系起来，以揭示两者之间的深层数学结构。
AI.method: 作者展示了特定高度函数h(x,t)=(3t²x+x³)/6t的一维KPZ方程与由非线性随机过程驱动的Loewner方程之间的对应关系，并通过数值模拟验证了这一对应。
AI.result: 研究发现一维界面生长动力学可以用Loewner熵S_Loew≃-ln(t/κ)来表征，建立了KPZ方程与SLE之间的具体数学对应关系，并通过数值验证了这一结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功建立了KPZ方程与SLE理论之间的桥梁，为理解非平衡统计物理中的普适性提供了新的视角，表明界面生长过程可以用随机共形映射的框架来描述。

title: KappaFormer: Physics-aware Transformer for lattice thermal conductivity via cross-domain transfer learning
summary: Machine learning has been widely used for predicting material properties. However, efficient prediction of lattice thermal conductivity ($κ_\mathrm{L}$) remains a long-standing challenge, primarily due to the scarcity of high-quality training data. Here we introduce KappaFormer, a physics-aware Transformer architecture that embeds the harmonic-anharmonic decomposition of $κ_\mathrm{L}$ within the network. KappaFormer comprises a harmonic branch pre-trained on large-scale elastic property data and an anharmonic branch fine-tuned on limited experimental $κ_\mathrm{L}$ data, enabling effective knowledge transfer and enhanced generalization. High-throughput screening with KappaFormer identifies multiple candidates with ultralow $κ_\mathrm{L}$, which are further confirmed by first-principles calculations. Physics interpretability further elucidates the vibrational mechanisms governing thermal transport suppression, linking structural motifs to strong anharmonicity. This study provides a generalizable framework for physics-guided machine learning to accelerate the discovery of new materials.

AI.tldr: KappaFormer：一种物理感知的Transformer架构，通过嵌入晶格热导率的谐波-非谐波分解，利用大规模弹性数据预训练和有限实验数据微调，实现高效热导率预测和新材料发现。
AI.motivation: 晶格热导率（κ_L）的高效预测一直是材料科学中的长期挑战，主要由于高质量训练数据的稀缺。传统机器学习方法难以在数据有限的情况下准确预测这一复杂物理性质。
AI.method: 提出KappaFormer物理感知Transformer架构，将κ_L的谐波-非谐波分解嵌入网络结构中。包含：1）谐波分支，在大规模弹性性质数据上预训练；2）非谐波分支，在有限实验κ_L数据上微调。通过这种分解实现知识迁移和增强泛化能力。
AI.result: 通过高通量筛选识别出多个超低κ_L候选材料，并经过第一性原理计算验证。物理可解释性分析揭示了控制热输运抑制的振动机制，将结构基元与强非谐性联系起来。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个通用的物理引导机器学习框架，可加速新材料发现。KappaFormer通过物理感知架构和知识迁移策略，有效解决了热导率预测中的数据稀缺问题。

title: BosonFlow: A C++ codebase for dynamic fRG and single-boson exchange in correlated fermion systems
summary: We present a unified C++ implementation of the functional renormalization group and the parquet equations within the single-boson exchange formalism for several paradigmatic tight-binding and impurity models at equilibrium. The implementation computes the full dynamic vertex and self-energies, with momentum dependence treated using a truncated unity framework. We implement multiple self-energy flow equations, cutoff schemes, and extensions ranging from the dynamical functional renormalization group to multiloop flow equations that incorporate cutoffs in both the propagator and the interaction. The codebase serves as a reference for recent developments in the fRG and parquet methods for correlated electron systems and provides a flexible foundation for developing new many-body approaches and extensions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个统一的C++实现，用于功能重整化群和单玻色子交换形式下的parquet方程，适用于多种紧束缚和杂质模型，计算全动态顶点和自能，采用截断统一性框架处理动量依赖。
AI.motivation: 为相关电子系统的fRG和parquet方法提供一个统一的参考实现，支持多种自能流方程、截断方案和扩展，为开发新的多体方法和扩展提供灵活基础。
AI.method: 采用统一的C++实现，基于单玻色子交换形式，结合功能重整化群和parquet方程，使用截断统一性框架处理动量依赖，实现多种自能流方程、截断方案和扩展。
AI.result: 开发了一个代码库，能够计算全动态顶点和自能，支持从动态功能重整化群到多环流方程的各种扩展，包括传播子和相互作用中的截断。
AI.conclusion: 该实现为相关电子系统的fRG和parquet方法提供了参考基准，为开发新的多体方法和扩展奠定了灵活的基础。

title: Electron dynamics mediate the water-carbon π bond
summary: The intermolecular interaction between a water molecule and the electrons in aromatic π systems--the water-π bond--lies at the heart of many chemical processes, yet its properties remain challenging to measure experimentally and model computationally. Infrared spectroscopy of pyrene anions hydrated by a single water molecule reveals vibrational and electronic motions that are often hidden in condensed phase measurements. Results from new machine-learning approaches to potentials and dipole moments show that the electron dynamics of the aromatic π cloud quench signals from some of water's vibrations and amplify others. The observed interplay between electronic and vibrational motions has general implications for modeling intermolecular interactions between water and aromatic systems in clusters, solutions, and at interfaces.

AI.tldr: 水分子与芳香π系统电子间的相互作用（水-π键）在许多化学过程中至关重要，但实验测量和计算建模仍具挑战。通过吡啶阴离子单水合物的红外光谱研究，结合机器学习势能和偶极矩方法，揭示了芳香π云电子动力学对水振动的信号抑制和放大效应。
AI.motivation: 水分子与芳香π系统电子间的相互作用（水-π键）是许多化学过程的核心，但其性质在实验测量和计算建模方面仍面临挑战。理解这种相互作用对于研究水与芳香系统在团簇、溶液和界面中的相互作用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用吡啶阴离子单水合物的红外光谱技术，结合新的机器学习方法来计算势能和偶极矩。通过这种方法研究芳香π云电子动力学对水分子振动信号的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现芳香π云的电子动力学会抑制某些水分子振动的信号，同时放大其他振动的信号。这种电子运动与振动运动之间的相互作用在红外光谱中清晰可见，而这些现象在凝聚相测量中往往被隐藏。
AI.conclusion: 观察到的电子与振动运动之间的相互作用对于建模水与芳香系统在团簇、溶液和界面中的分子间相互作用具有普遍意义。这项研究为理解水-π键的复杂性质提供了新的见解。

title: A Top-Loading Point-Contact Spectroscopy Probe with In-Situ Sample Exchange for Dilution Refrigerators
summary: We report the design and implementation of a point-contact spectroscopy (PCS) system integrated with a dilution refrigerator, enabling measurements down to 30 mK. The setup employs a needle-anvil geometry with a cryogenic piezo-driven nanopositioner for in-situ formation of mesoscopic point contacts. We discuss the thermal anchoring strategies that enable efficient cooling of the probe to ultra-low temperatures and reliable measurements. We also address positioner-related challenges and the solutions implemented to ensure stable operation at millikelvin temperatures. The performance of the probe is demonstrated through point contact spectroscopy on Ta-doped TiSe$_2$ (Ta$_x$Ti$_{1-x}$Se$_2$, $x = 0.2$), a superconductor with $T_c \approx 2.3$ K. The spectra exhibit well-defined superconducting features that systematically diminish with increasing temperature and magnetic field. The platform provides a robust and versatile tool for spectroscopic investigations of superconductors and other quantum materials at millikelvin temperatures and high magnetic fields.

AI.tldr: 开发了集成稀释制冷机的点接触光谱系统，可在30 mK低温下测量，应用于Ta掺杂TiSe₂超导体研究
AI.motivation: 需要开发能够在毫开尔文温度下进行点接触光谱测量的实验平台，以研究超导体和其他量子材料在极端低温下的性质
AI.method: 设计并实现集成稀释制冷机的PCS系统，采用针-砧几何结构，配备低温压电驱动纳米定位器，实现原位形成介观点接触，并优化热锚定策略
AI.result: 成功构建可在30 mK低温下工作的PCS系统，在Ta掺杂TiSe₂超导体中观察到清晰的超导特征，这些特征随温度和磁场增加而系统性地减弱
AI.conclusion: 该平台为在毫开尔文温度和高磁场下研究超导体和其他量子材料提供了稳健且多功能的工具

title: Co-Authoring with AI: How I Wrote a Physics Paper About AI, Using AI
summary: The rapid integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into scientific writing fundamentally challenges traditional definitions of authorship, responsibility, and scientific integrity. As researchers transition from using computers as deterministic tools to managing them as ``virtual collaborators,'' the nature of human contribution must be re-evaluated. Using the drafting process of a recent computational physics manuscript as a case study, this essay explores the indispensable role of the Human-in-the-Loop (HITL). We demonstrate that while AI excels at structural organization and syntax generation, the human author bears the ultimate responsibility for enforcing rigorous physical logic, maintaining academic diplomacy, and anticipating peer-review critiques. In this paradigm, the human contribution shifts from writing boilerplate text to acting as a Principal Investigator who actively mentors and steers the AI's reasoning. To ensure accountability and preserve the integrity of the scientific record in this new era, I argue that the community must mandate the publication of full, unedited AI interaction transcripts as standard supplementary material.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了LLMs在科学写作中作为"虚拟合作者"的角色转变，强调人类在物理逻辑、学术外交和同行评审预期中的不可替代作用，并主张强制公开完整的AI交互记录作为补充材料以确保科学诚信。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在科学写作中的快速应用对传统的作者身份、责任和科学诚信定义提出了根本性挑战。随着研究人员从将计算机作为确定性工具转变为管理它们作为"虚拟合作者"，人类贡献的性质需要重新评估。
AI.method: 以最近一篇计算物理学手稿的起草过程为案例研究，探讨了人类在循环中的不可或缺作用。通过具体实践展示了AI在结构组织和语法生成方面的优势，以及人类在物理逻辑、学术外交和同行评审预期方面的核心责任。
AI.result: 研究发现，虽然AI擅长结构组织和语法生成，但人类作者承担着执行严格物理逻辑、维护学术外交和预期同行评审批评的最终责任。在这种范式中，人类贡献从编写样板文本转变为作为主动指导和引导AI推理的首席研究员。
AI.conclusion: 为确保问责制并在这个新时代保护科学记录的完整性，作者主张科学界必须强制要求将完整的、未经编辑的AI交互记录作为标准补充材料公开发布。

title: Theoretical study of spin-dependent transport in WSe$_2$-based vertical spin valves
summary: We theoretically investigate spin-dependent transport in a TMD-based vertical spin valve, taking WSe$_2$ as a representative example. Using effective Hamiltonians for the heterostructure and the Landauer formula, we derive the transmission and reflection coefficients within a transfer-matrix approach. The calculated magnetoresistance shows an oscillatory dependence on the WSe$_2$ thickness when the Fermi level is tuned near the valence-band maximum. The effects of gate voltage and exchange fields on the magnetoresistance are further analyzed. We also identify a Fabry-Pérot-like interference contribution to the magnetoresistance, which can enhance or even induce negative magnetoresistance in certain thickness regimes. Our results provide a qualitative understanding of the negative magnetoresistance observed in WSe$_2$-based spin valves and may offer useful insights for the design of tunable spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 研究WSe₂垂直自旋阀中自旋相关输运的理论分析，发现磁阻随WSe₂厚度振荡变化，存在法布里-珀罗干涉效应，可导致负磁阻现象。
AI.motivation: 理解WSe₂基自旋阀中观察到的负磁阻现象，为可调谐自旋电子器件设计提供理论指导。
AI.method: 采用有效哈密顿量描述异质结构，结合Landauer公式，通过转移矩阵方法推导透射和反射系数。
AI.result: 磁阻随WSe₂厚度呈现振荡依赖关系，费米能级靠近价带顶时尤为明显；法布里-珀罗干涉效应可增强或诱导负磁阻；栅压和交换场对磁阻有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 理论结果定性解释了WSe₂基自旋阀中的负磁阻现象，为可调谐自旋电子器件设计提供了有用见解。

title: Geometry- and topology-controlled synchronization phase transition on manifolds
summary: In this work, we explore how the geometry and topology of the underlying manifold shape the synchronization phase transition of a system. To do so, we extend the Kuramoto-Sakaguchi model from spheres to compact, connected, orientable, and homogeneous Riemannian manifolds of arbitrary dimension. Starting from the mean-field kinetic equation on the manifold, we derive a local response equation for the order parameter near the incoherent state and separate the geometric and topological contributions to the phase transition out of the incoherent state. The manifold geometry determines a coefficient $κ\left(M\right)$ to control the critical coupling for the linear loss of stability of the incoherent state. The manifold topology constrains the cubic term of the response equation through the Euler characteristic $χ\left(M\right)$. Under a local sign condition on the cubic term, topology does not allow a generic continuous or tricritical synchronization phase transition to occur when $χ\left(M\right)\neq 0$, and it imposes a non-zero net defect charge on the incipient ordered texture. When an additional local stabilization condition holds in that nonzero-Euler class, topology further selects a discontinuous phase transition. When $χ\left(M\right)=0$, topology does not impose that obstruction, so continuous, discontinuous, and tricritical local branches are all allowed. We verify these findings on representative families including hyperspheres, equal even-sphere products, complex Grassmannians, complex projective spaces, flat tori, real Stiefel manifolds, rotation groups, and unitary groups. Our framework recovers the classical hyperspherical parity law and extends it to a broad class of non-spherical state spaces.

AI.tldr: 该研究将Kuramoto-Sakaguchi模型从球面推广到任意维度的紧致连通可定向齐次黎曼流形，揭示了流形几何和拓扑如何影响同步相变：几何决定临界耦合系数，拓扑通过欧拉示性数约束相变类型。
AI.motivation: 探索底层流形的几何和拓扑特性如何影响系统的同步相变行为，将经典的球面模型推广到更一般的流形上，以理解几何和拓扑在集体动力学中的作用。
AI.method: 将Kuramoto-Sakaguchi模型扩展到任意维度的紧致连通可定向齐次黎曼流形，从流形上的平均场动力学方程出发，推导出非相干态附近序参量的局部响应方程，分离几何和拓扑对相变的贡献。
AI.result: 流形几何通过系数κ(M)控制非相干态线性失稳的临界耦合；流形拓扑通过欧拉示性数χ(M)约束响应方程的三次项。当χ(M)≠0时，拓扑不允许一般的连续或三临界同步相变，并强制有序纹理具有非零净缺陷电荷。当χ(M)=0时，拓扑不施加这种限制，允许连续、不连续和三临界局部分支。
AI.conclusion: 该框架揭示了流形几何和拓扑在同步相变中的决定性作用：几何控制临界点，拓扑约束相变类型和有序纹理的拓扑缺陷。这恢复了经典的超球面奇偶律，并将其扩展到广泛的非球面状态空间。

title: First-principles theory of spin magnetic multipole moments in antiferromagnets
summary: Antiferromagnets with vanishing net magnetization are naturally expected to host higher-order magnetic multipole moments. Understanding and utilizing the multipole degrees of freedom are imperative for novel conceptual designs and applications unique to antiferromagnets. However, a universal, quantitative definition of magnetic multipole moments of antiferromagnetic materials is currently lacking. In this work we provide a unified description of arbitrary-order spin magnetic multipole moments (SM$^3$) of antiferromagnets by introducing a nonlocal spin density in macroscopic Maxwell equations. The formalism makes it transparent how SM$^3$ calculated for translationally invariant bulk systems corresponds to experimental observables when translation symmetry is broken. Through the nonlocal spin density calculated from first principles, we propose a robust scheme to extract arbitrary-order SM$^3$ through symmetry-constrained fitting at long wavelengths. Using this approach, we have calculated SM$^3$ of a few representative antiferromagnets, including $α$-$\rm Fe_2O_3$, Mn$_3$Sn, and Mn$_3$NiN. Moreover, we clarify the role of spin-orbit coupling (SOC) in SM$^3$, especially in the weak SOC limit where clean predictions can be made based on symmetry principles. Our work paves the way for systematically investigating multipolar order parameters of unconventional magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个统一的理论框架来定义和计算反铁磁材料中任意阶的自旋磁多极矩，通过引入非局域自旋密度到宏观麦克斯韦方程中，并开发了基于对称性约束拟合的稳健计算方法。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁材料具有净磁化强度为零的特性，理论上应存在高阶磁多极矩。然而，目前缺乏一个通用、定量的反铁磁材料磁多极矩定义方法，这限制了对其多极自由度的理解和应用。
AI.method: 通过将非局域自旋密度引入宏观麦克斯韦方程，建立统一描述反铁磁材料任意阶自旋磁多极矩的理论框架。提出基于对称性约束的长波长拟合方案，从第一性原理计算的非局域自旋密度中提取任意阶多极矩。
AI.result: 成功计算了α-Fe₂O₃、Mn₃Sn和Mn₃NiN等代表性反铁磁材料的自旋磁多极矩。阐明了自旋轨道耦合在多极矩中的作用，特别是在弱自旋轨道耦合极限下，基于对称性原理可以做出清晰的预测。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为系统研究非常规磁性材料的多极序参数铺平了道路，提供了统一的理论框架和计算方法，有助于理解和利用反铁磁材料中独特的多极自由度。

title: Topological Phase Transitions and Their Thermodynamic Fate in Arbitrary-$S$ Pyrochlore Spin Ice
summary: We develop a self-contained theoretical framework that classifies the topological phases and critical phenomena of classical pyrochlore magnets with arbitrary spin $S$, subject to competing exchange and single-ion anisotropies. In the small-$w$ regime, where the single-ion term favors low spin amplitudes, exact dualities reveal a dichotomy: integer spins exhibit a continuous 3D $XY$ deconfinement transition, whereas half-integer spins remain in a $U(1)$ Coulomb liquid without any transition. In the large-$w$ regime, where the local spin amplitudes are maximized ($|S^z| = S$), the macroscopic flux is quantized to multiples of $2S$. By mapping the defect structure to topological loop gases, we prove that the compatibility between the physical ice rule and the emergent $\mathbb{Z}_{2S}$ flux conservation holds if and only if $S \le 3/2$. For $S=3/2$, this maps the system to the 3-state Potts model, whose symmetry-allowed cubic invariant drives a first-order transition. For $S \ge 2$, monopole contamination breaks the discrete clock mapping. Using an exact decomposition of the partition function, we show that the hierarchical string fusion cascade exponentially suppresses the discrete perturbations, which act as a dangerously irrelevant operator at the 3D $XY$ fixed point, protecting 3D $XY$ criticality. Finally, incorporating thermal monopoles, we show that they act as a symmetry-breaking effective magnetic field that severs defect strings. Consequently, the continuous transitions are rounded into crossovers, whereas the first-order $S=3/2$ transition is predicted to survive at finite temperatures, terminating at a critical endpoint. Classical Monte Carlo simulations for $S$ up to $7/2$ corroborate these analytical predictions.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了经典烧绿石磁体的拓扑相分类理论框架，揭示了自旋量子数S对相变性质的决定性影响：整数自旋呈现3D XY临界性，半整数自旋保持U(1)库仑液体，S=3/2映射到3态Potts模型的一级相变，S≥2时单极子污染破坏离散映射但危险无关算符保护XY临界性。
AI.motivation: 研究经典烧绿石磁体在竞争交换和各向异性作用下的拓扑相和临界现象，理解自旋量子数S如何影响系统的相变行为，特别是整数与半整数自旋的差异以及不同S值对应的相变类型。
AI.method: 建立自洽理论框架，使用精确对偶性分析小w和大w两种极限情况。通过映射到拓扑环气体和缺陷结构分析，采用精确配分函数分解和层次弦融合级联方法，结合经典蒙特卡洛模拟验证理论预测。
AI.result: 发现整数自旋呈现连续3D XY解禁闭相变，半整数自旋保持U(1)库仑液体无相变。S=3/2映射到3态Potts模型的一级相变。S≥2时单极子污染破坏离散映射，但危险无关算符保护3D XY临界性。热单极子将连续相变变为交叉，但S=3/2的一级相变在有限温度下保持。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架成功分类了经典烧绿石磁体的拓扑相和临界现象，揭示了自旋量子数S对相变类型的决定性作用，并通过蒙特卡洛模拟验证了理论预测，为理解此类系统的相变行为提供了统一的理论描述。

title: Non-Negative Least Squares Reweighting and Pruning of Quadrature Grids for Tensor Hypercontraction
summary: Tensor hypercontraction provides an attractive four-center two-electron repulsion integral format that can lower the scaling of many electronic structure methods while only requiring O(N^2) memory. However, in its grid-based least-squares incarnation, tensor hypercontraction requires the tedious design of compact spatial quadrature grids to achieve efficiency and accuracy, representing a bottleneck for widespread application. To simplify grid generation, we devise a reweighting scheme in which the grid weights are optimized to ensure accurate reproduction of the atomic orbital overlap matrix by numerical integration. By casting this fitting task as a non-negative least-squares problem, we obtain a black-box methodology that not only yields robust grids for tensor hypercontraction as well as numerical integration of other integrals but also prunes the grids by zeroing quadrature weights for insignificant points.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于重加权的黑盒网格生成方法，用于张量超压缩中的数值积分，通过优化网格权重准确再现原子轨道重叠矩阵，同时修剪不重要网格点。
AI.motivation: 张量超压缩虽然能降低电子结构方法的计算复杂度，但其基于最小二乘的网格方法需要繁琐设计紧凑空间求积网格，这成为广泛应用的瓶颈。需要简化网格生成过程。
AI.method: 设计重加权方案，将网格权重优化问题转化为非负最小二乘问题，确保数值积分准确再现原子轨道重叠矩阵，同时自动修剪不重要网格点。
AI.result: 该方法不仅为张量超压缩提供鲁棒的网格，也适用于其他积分数值积分，实现了黑盒化的网格生成，通过零化不重要点的求积权重来修剪网格。
AI.conclusion: 提出的重加权方案简化了张量超压缩的网格生成，解决了传统方法需要繁琐设计的问题，为电子结构方法提供了更实用的数值积分框架。

title: Disentangling electronic and phononic contributions to high-temperature superconductivity in X2MH6 hydrides
summary: Understanding the factors that control superconductivity is essential for discovering new superconducting materials using high-throughput elemental substitution. Focusing on the recently predicted ambient-pressure superconducting X2MH6 family, we disentangle the phononic and electronic contributions to Tc to determine how isoelectronic substitution alters superconductivity. While substitution affects both phononic and electronic properties, the electronic contribution plays the dominant role in determining Tc in the X2MH6 family. We show that the electronic contribution is affected by three key factors: the X-H bond distance, the electron localization function networking value of hydrogen, and the hydrogen-projected density of states at the Fermi level. A combined figure of merit derived from these parameters exhibits a robust correlation with Tc across the family. We further show that pressure produces competing effects on superconductivity: it enhances the electronic contribution by shortening X-H bonds, but simultaneously weaken the phononic contribution by increasing phonon frequencies. The net pressure dependence of Tc therefore results from the balance between these opposing tendencies. By disentangling and analyzing the electronic and phononic mechanisms, this work provides comprehensive insight into superconductivity in X2MH6 hydrides and offers practical guidance for designing new high-Tc hydride superconductors.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了X2MH6氢化物超导家族中电子贡献对Tc的主导作用，并识别了影响电子贡献的三个关键因素，为设计新型高Tc氢化物超导体提供了指导。
AI.motivation: 理解控制超导性的因素对于通过高通量元素替代发现新型超导材料至关重要。研究聚焦于最近预测的常压超导X2MH6家族，旨在解析声子和电子对Tc的贡献，以确定等电子替代如何改变超导性。
AI.method: 通过分析X2MH6家族中不同元素替代对超导性的影响，分离声子和电子对Tc的贡献。识别影响电子贡献的三个关键参数：X-H键距离、氢的电子局域函数网络值以及费米能级处的氢投影态密度。
AI.result: 研究发现电子贡献在决定X2MH6家族Tc中起主导作用。基于三个关键参数构建的综合品质因数与Tc在整个家族中呈现稳健相关性。压力对超导性产生竞争效应：通过缩短X-H键增强电子贡献，但通过增加声子频率削弱声子贡献。
AI.conclusion: 通过解析和分析电子与声子机制，这项工作为X2MH6氢化物的超导性提供了全面见解，并为设计新型高Tc氢化物超导体提供了实用指导。电子贡献的主导作用和关键影响因素识别为材料设计提供了具体方向。

title: From Paper to Program: A Multi-Stage LLM-Assisted Workflow for Accelerating Quantum Many-Body Algorithm Development
summary: Translating quantum many-body theory into scalable software traditionally requires months of effort. Zero-shot generation of tensor network algorithms by Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently fails due to spatial reasoning errors and memory bottlenecks. We resolve this using a multi-stage workflow that mimics a physics research group. By generating a mathematically rigorous LaTeX specification as an intermediate blueprint, we constrain the coding LLM to produce exact, matrix-free $\mathcal{O}(D^3)$ operations. We validate this approach by generating a Density-Matrix Renormalization Group (DMRG) engine that accurately captures the critical entanglement scaling of the Spin-$1/2$ Heisenberg model and the symmetry-protected topological (SPT) order of the Spin-$1$ AKLT model. Testing across 16 combinations of leading foundation models yielded a 100\% success rate. By compressing a months-long development cycle into under 24 hours ($\sim 14$ active hours), this framework offers a highly reproducible paradigm for accelerating computational physics research.

AI.tldr: LLM生成张量网络算法的多阶段工作流程，通过生成LaTeX规范作为中间蓝图，实现精确的矩阵无关O(D^3)操作，成功生成DMRG引擎并验证其准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统量子多体理论转化为可扩展软件需要数月时间，而LLM零样本生成张量网络算法常因空间推理错误和内存瓶颈而失败，需要更可靠的方法来加速计算物理研究。
AI.method: 采用多阶段工作流程，模拟物理研究小组的工作方式：首先生成数学严谨的LaTeX规范作为中间蓝图，然后约束编码LLM生成精确的矩阵无关O(D^3)操作，最后生成DMRG引擎。
AI.result: 在16种领先基础模型组合测试中达到100%成功率，生成的DMRG引擎准确捕捉了Spin-1/2 Heisenberg模型的临界纠缠缩放和Spin-1 AKLT模型的对称保护拓扑序，将数月开发周期压缩到24小时内。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过生成数学规范作为中间蓝图，解决了LLM生成张量网络算法的可靠性问题，为加速计算物理研究提供了高度可重复的范式。

title: Nonreciprocal current induced by dissipation in time-reversal symmetric systems
summary: We study nonreciprocal current response in noncentrosymmetric crystals under time-reversal symmetry. We show that the nonreciprocal current appears in a dissipative system through interband processes. The nonreciprocal current is inversely proportional to the lifetime $τ$ and has a close relationship to the geometric quantity called the shift vector. The current mechanism is suitable for minigap systems where the energy gap and relaxation strength are comparable. We present a numerical simulation of the nonreciprocal current in the one-dimensional Rice--Mele model.

AI.tldr: 研究非中心对称晶体在时间反演对称性下的非互易电流响应，发现非互易电流通过带间过程出现在耗散系统中，与称为位移矢量的几何量密切相关，适用于能隙与弛豫强度相当的微能隙系统。
AI.motivation: 研究非中心对称晶体在时间反演对称性下的非互易电流响应机制，探索在耗散系统中通过带间过程产生非互易电流的可能性。
AI.method: 理论分析非互易电流在耗散系统中的产生机制，建立电流与位移矢量的关系，并通过一维Rice-Mele模型进行数值模拟验证。
AI.result: 发现非互易电流通过带间过程出现在耗散系统中，电流与寿命τ成反比，与位移矢量几何量密切相关，适用于能隙与弛豫强度相当的微能隙系统。
AI.conclusion: 非中心对称晶体在时间反演对称性下可通过带间过程产生非互易电流响应，该机制与几何位移矢量相关，特别适用于微能隙系统，为一维Rice-Mele模型的数值模拟所验证。

title: Cross Spectra Break the Single-Channel Impossibility
summary: Lucente et al. proved that no time-irreversibility measure can detect departure from equilibrium in a scalar Gaussian time series from a linear system. We show that a second observed channel sharing the same hidden driver overcomes this impossibility: the cross-spectral block, structurally inaccessible to any single-channel measure, provides qualitatively new detectability. Under the diagonal null hypothesis, the cross-spectral detectability coefficient $\Scross$ (the leading quartic-order cross contribution) is \emph{exactly} independent of the observed timescales -- a cancellation governed solely by hidden-mode parameters -- and remains strictly positive at exact timescale coalescence, where all single-channel measures vanish. The mechanism is geometric: the cross spectrum occupies the off-diagonal subspace of the spectral matrix, orthogonal to any diagonal null and therefore invisible in any single-channel reduction. For the one-way coupled Ornstein--Uhlenbeck counterpart, the entropy production rate (EPR) satisfies $\EPRtot=α_2λ^2$ exactly; under this coupling geometry, $\Scross>0$ certifies $\EPRtot>0$, linking observable cross-spectral structure to full-system dissipation via $\EPRtot^{\,2}\propto\Scross$. Finite-sample simulations predict a quantitative detection-threshold split testable with dual colloidal probes and multisite climate stations.

AI.tldr: 单通道高斯时间序列无法检测时间不可逆性，但双通道观测通过交叉谱结构可突破此限制，交叉谱检测系数与观测时间尺度无关，严格为正，可证明系统耗散。
AI.motivation: Lucente等人证明单通道高斯时间序列无法检测时间不可逆性，本文旨在突破这一限制，通过双通道观测共享同一隐藏驱动，利用交叉谱结构实现检测。
AI.method: 引入双通道观测系统，分析交叉谱块结构，定义交叉谱检测系数Scross，证明其与观测时间尺度无关且严格为正，建立与熵产生率EPR的精确关系。
AI.result: 交叉谱检测系数Scross在精确时间尺度重合时仍为正，而单通道检测为零；对于单向耦合OU过程，EPR与Scross存在平方比例关系，可通过双通道观测检测系统耗散。
AI.conclusion: 双通道观测通过交叉谱结构可突破单通道检测时间不可逆性的限制，交叉谱检测系数与系统耗散直接相关，为实验检测提供了理论框架。

title: Interaction driven transverse thermal resistivity in a phonon gas
summary: The amplitude of the Hall response of electrons can be understood without invoking interactions. Most theories of the phonon thermal Hall effect have likewise opted for a non-interacting picture. Here, we challenge this approach. Our study of WS$_2$, a transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) insulator, finds that longitudinal, $κ_{xx}$, and transverse, $κ_{xy}$, thermal conductivities peak at almost the same temperature. Their ratio obeys an upper bound, as in other insulators. We then compare transverse thermal transport in a phonon gas and in a molecular gas. In the latter, the Senftleben-Beenakker effect is driven by the competition between molecular collisions and applied magnetic field in setting the distribution of molecular angular momenta. An off-diagonal transport response arises thanks to interactions between non-spherical particles, which do not need to be chiral. By analogy, we argue that in a phonon gas, magnetic field will influence phonon-phonon interactions, and generates a transverse thermal \emph{resistivity}, whose order of magnitude can be accounted for by invoking a Berry force on the drift velocity of the nuclei in the presence of a finite heat. This simple picture gives a reasonable account of the experimentally measured transverse thermal resistivity of seven different crystalline insulators.

AI.tldr: 该论文挑战了传统非相互作用模型对声子热霍尔效应的解释，通过研究WS₂等绝缘体发现纵向和横向热导率峰值温度相近，提出声子-声子相互作用在磁场下会产生横向热电阻率。
AI.motivation: 传统理论用非相互作用模型解释声子热霍尔效应，但作者认为需要考虑相互作用。他们发现WS₂等绝缘体中纵向和横向热导率峰值温度几乎相同，这暗示需要新的理论框架来解释声子系统的横向热输运。
AI.method: 通过实验测量WS₂等七种晶体绝缘体的纵向和横向热导率，比较声子气体和分子气体的横向输运行为。借鉴分子气体中的Senftleben-Beenakker效应（分子碰撞与磁场竞争决定角动量分布），提出声子气体中磁场会影响声子-声子相互作用，产生横向热电阻率。
AI.result: 实验发现κₓₓ和κₓᵧ峰值温度几乎相同，比值符合上限。提出的相互作用模型能合理估算七种不同晶体绝缘体的横向热电阻率大小，支持磁场通过影响声子-声子相互作用产生横向热输运的观点。
AI.conclusion: 声子热霍尔效应不能仅用非相互作用模型解释，需要考虑声子-声子相互作用。磁场会影响这些相互作用，产生横向热电阻率，这一简单图像能合理解释多种绝缘体的实验数据。

title: Temperature evolution of orbital states with successive phase transitions in FeV2O4
comment: 35 pages, 6 figures, supplementary text with 9 supplementary figures and 13 supplementary tables. Submitted to Phys. Rev.X
summary: Direct experimental access to orbital states in strongly correlated materials remains a major challenge, despite their central role in driving coupled structural and magnetic phase transitions. In systems where electronic correlations, electron-lattice coupling, and relativistic spin-orbit interactions compete on comparable energy scales, even first-principles calculations often yield multiple metastable solutions, hindering the unambiguous identification of the ground state. Here, we demonstrate that the orbital states of the spinel oxide FeV2O4, which possesses active orbital degrees of freedom on both Fe and V ions, are uniquely resolved by combining valence electron density (VED) analysis based on state-of-the-art synchrotron x-ray diffraction with spin-polarized density-functional-theory calculations. Our results reveal that temperature-dependent rearrangements of orbital occupations drive successive structural transitions that accompany collinear and noncoplanar ferrimagnetic orders, establishing a direct correspondence between orbital anisotropy and spin structure. More broadly, this work shows that experimentally determined VED provides a decisive real-space constraint on competing theoretical solutions, offering a powerful and broadly applicable framework for elucidating the microscopic mechanisms of complex phase transitions in strongly correlated electron systems.

AI.tldr: 通过结合价电子密度实验测量与自旋极化密度泛函理论计算，解决了FeV2O4中轨道态的多重解问题，揭示了轨道重排驱动结构相变与磁序演化的微观机制。
AI.motivation: 强关联材料中轨道态的实验探测面临挑战，特别是在电子关联、电子-晶格耦合和自旋轨道相互作用竞争相当的情况下，第一性原理计算常产生多重亚稳态解，难以明确确定基态。
AI.method: 结合基于同步辐射X射线衍射的价电子密度实验分析与自旋极化密度泛函理论计算，对尖晶石氧化物FeV2O4（Fe和V离子均具有活性轨道自由度）进行综合研究。
AI.result: 实验确定的价电子密度为竞争理论解提供了决定性约束，揭示了温度依赖的轨道占据重排驱动了伴随共线和非共面亚铁磁序的连续结构相变，建立了轨道各向异性与自旋结构的直接对应关系。
AI.conclusion: 实验测定的价电子密度为竞争理论解提供了关键约束，建立了阐明强关联电子系统中复杂相变微观机制的普适框架。

title: PyGSC: A Python tool for correcting Kohn-Sham orbital energies by mitigating the delocalization error of density functional approximations
summary: Density functional approximations (DFAs) suffer from delocalization error, which limits their accuracy in predicting electron affinities (EAs), ionization potentials (IPs), and quasiparticle energies. In this work, we present a theoretical refinement of the quasiparticle energies from density functional theory (QE-DFT) method by improving the perturbative expression for the exchange-correlation potential, leading to a more consistent description of molecular systems. We further develop an open-source Python program, PyGSC, built upon the PySCF library, which implements the modified QE-DFT framework. Benchmark tests on main-group atoms and G2/97 molecules demonstrate that the modified QE-DFT method outperforms the original DFAs, with third-order corrections achieving mean absolute deviations below 0.3 eV for EA and IP predictions. Application to dipole-bound states of DNA/RNA nucleobases further validates the superiority of the QE-DFT approach over original DFAs, offering an efficient and accurate approach for predicting electronic properties in large molecular systems.

AI.tldr: 改进的QE-DFT方法通过修正交换相关势的微扰表达式，显著提升了电子亲和能、电离势和准粒子能量的预测精度，并在DNA/RNA核碱基的偶极束缚态应用中验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 密度泛函近似存在离域误差，限制了其在预测电子亲和能、电离势和准粒子能量方面的准确性，需要开发更精确的理论方法。
AI.method: 改进QE-DFT方法的微扰表达式，优化交换相关势的描述；开发基于PySCF的开源Python程序PyGSC实现改进的QE-DFT框架。
AI.result: 在主族原子和G2/97分子上的基准测试显示，改进的QE-DFT方法优于原始DFA，三阶修正的EA和IP预测平均绝对偏差低于0.3 eV；在DNA/RNA核碱基偶极束缚态应用中进一步验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: 改进的QE-DFT方法为大型分子体系的电子性质预测提供了一种高效且准确的途径，显著提升了密度泛函理论在电子结构计算中的可靠性。

title: Multimodal Terahertz Spectroscopy of the Pairing Symmetry and Normal-State Pseudogap in (La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ Films
summary: The discovery of ambient-pressure superconductivity in compressively strained (La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films has intensified efforts to identify the pairing mechanism. However, the symmetry of the superconducting order parameter and the character of the normal state remain unsettled. Here we combine bulk-sensitive terahertz (THz) time-domain spectroscopy with THz third-harmonic generation to present spectroscopic insights into these issues. Linear THz spectroscopy reveals a bulk superconducting response in the (La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ films, evidenced by the suppression of low-frequency spectral weight below the onset critical temperature, $T_\mathrm{c}^{\mathrm{onset}}$. A weak coherence peak near $T_\mathrm{c}^{\mathrm{onset}}$, together with substantial residual low-frequency conductivity as $T\to 0$, is consistent with disordered $s_{\pm}$-wave pairing. In the nonlinear regime, the third-harmonic signal rises sharply on cooling through $T_\mathrm{c}^{\mathrm{onset}}$, providing an independent signature of the transition. Strikingly, the nonlinear response persists above $T_\mathrm{c}^{\mathrm{onset}}$, pointing to either disorder-enhanced nonlinearity or a distinct correlated normal state. Motivated by angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy on similarly grown films that identifies a comparable temperature scale, we associate the anomalous normal-state terahertz nonlinearity with a pseudogap. These results establish (La,Pr)$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ as a bulk superconductor with $s_{\pm}$-like pairing that coexists with, and may compete with, a distinct ordered state, providing a platform for exploring unconventional superconductivity beyond cuprates and pnictides.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过太赫兹光谱技术证实(La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇薄膜具有体超导性，支持s±波配对，并发现超导转变温度以上存在异常非线性响应，可能与赝隙态相关。
AI.motivation: 在压缩应变(La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇薄膜中发现常压超导性后，需要确定其超导序参量对称性和正常态特性，以理解配对机制。
AI.method: 结合体敏感太赫兹时域光谱和太赫兹三次谐波产生技术，对(La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇薄膜进行线性和非线性光谱分析。
AI.result: 线性太赫兹光谱显示体超导响应，低频谱重抑制，弱相干峰和残余电导率支持无序s±波配对。非线性响应在Tc以上持续存在，表明异常正常态行为。
AI.conclusion: (La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇是具有s±波配对的体超导体，其超导态与独特的赝隙态共存并可能竞争，为探索超越铜基和铁基超导体的非常规超导性提供了新平台。

title: High-fidelity simulations of shock initiation of an energetic crystal-binder system due to flyer impact
comment: Pre-print. Final revision accepted in Shock Waves journal (Springer Nature Link) and in production
summary: Meso-scale simulations of energy localization at hotspots provide closure models for multiscale frameworks of shock-to-detonation transition (SDT). Validation of such meso-scale calculations is challenging as direct comparison with experiments is constrained both by limitations of data acquisition in the experiments (e.g., of temperature fields) and modeling over-simplifications in the simulations. To address the latter problem and bring modeling closer to experiments, we advance a high-fidelity meso-scale computational framework for interface-resolved reactive calculations of shock initiation in plastic-bonded explosives (PBXs). Accurate resolution of shock and interfacial dynamics is achieved through higher-order (5th-order WENO) schemes, and sharp interface treatments are implemented for physically accurate material-material interactions. Recently obtained atomistics-consistent material models are used for HMX, with the grid resolution taken down to atomistic scale (O(nm)). The crystal geometries are obtained directly from experiments via nano-CT imaging. The impacting flyer plate, energetic crystal and binder are tracked as distinct phases, and flyer-binder impact and separation are simulated, capturing the flyer deformation and the effects of relief waves from the flyer surface. By combining these high-fidelity modeling components, we evaluate how closely simulations can approach experimental data. Overall, this work provides as assessment of which aspects of numerical treatment and material modeling have the greatest impact on meso-scale simulations of flyer-induced initiation of PBXs, and points to where further improvements are necessary.

AI.tldr: 开发高保真介观尺度计算框架，用于模拟塑料粘结炸药（PBX）的冲击起爆，通过高阶数值方法、原子尺度材料模型和实验CT图像，评估模拟与实验的接近程度。
AI.motivation: 现有介观尺度模拟验证困难，一方面实验数据获取有限（如温度场），另一方面模拟存在过度简化。需要建立更高保真的计算框架，使模拟更接近实验。
AI.method: 采用高阶（5阶WENO）格式精确分辨冲击波和界面动力学；使用原子尺度一致的HMX材料模型；网格分辨率达到纳米级；直接从实验纳米CT图像获取晶体几何；将飞片、炸药晶体和粘结剂作为不同相进行追踪；模拟飞片-粘结剂冲击和分离过程。
AI.result: 建立了能够精确模拟飞片变形和表面稀疏波效应的高保真介观尺度计算框架，使模拟更接近实验数据。
AI.conclusion: 该工作评估了数值处理和材料建模对PBX飞片起爆介观尺度模拟的影响，指出了哪些方面对模拟精度最关键，以及需要进一步改进的方向。

title: A molecular dynamics simulation of thermalization of crystalline lattice with harmonic interaction
summary: Understanding the realization of thermal equilibrium through the thermalization process in a many-body system is a fundamental and complex scientific question, bridging thermodynamics and classical dynamics and connecting to a host of physical phenomena, such as mechanical instabilities in a thermal environment. In this work, based on the harmonic lattice model, we investigate the thermalization process in both velocity and coordinate spaces, by examining microscopic dynamics on the atomic level. We show the distinct relaxation rates of the transverse and longitudinal components of the velocity, reveal the power law governing the nonlinear proliferation of dominant frequencies, and observe the concurrent rapid proliferations of frequencies and topological defects. We also show that the lattice system's persistent out-of-plane deformations exhibit two-stage fluctuation behaviors, characterized by distinct power laws of fractional exponents and associated with the broken up-down symmetry. This work demonstrates the rich dynamics underlying the thermalization process, and advances our understanding on the dynamical adaptations of many-body systems to external disturbances.

AI.tldr: 基于谐波晶格模型研究多体系统热化过程，揭示速度与坐标空间中微观动力学特征，包括横向/纵向速度分量不同弛豫速率、主导频率非线性增殖幂律、频率与拓扑缺陷并发快速增殖，以及晶格系统持久面外变形呈现两阶段涨落行为。
AI.motivation: 理解多体系统通过热化过程实现热平衡是连接热力学与经典动力学的基础科学问题，涉及热环境中机械不稳定性等多种物理现象，需要从微观层面揭示热化过程的丰富动力学特征。
AI.method: 基于谐波晶格模型，在原子水平上研究速度空间和坐标空间中的热化过程，通过微观动力学分析揭示热化过程的特征。
AI.result: 发现横向和纵向速度分量具有不同的弛豫速率；揭示主导频率非线性增殖遵循幂律；观察到频率与拓扑缺陷并发快速增殖；晶格系统持久面外变形呈现两阶段涨落行为，具有分数指数的幂律特征，与上下对称性破缺相关。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作展示了热化过程中丰富的动力学特征，增进了对多体系统对外部扰动动态适应的理解，揭示了微观层面热化过程的复杂机制。

title: Shape of temperature dependence of spontaneous magnetization of various ferromagnets
summary: The shape of temperature dependence of spontaneous magnetization was analyzed on about forty ferromagnetic materials. The shape squareness was determined from the magnetization curves fits by the superellipse equation (Lame curve). The agreement of Lame curve fits with experimental data was good for most materials. The squareness parameter (the power coefficient in the superellipse equation), which reflects coupling strength between the nuclei vibrations and magnetic moments of electrons, was in the range from 1.4 to 3.0. The largest squareness showed iron, the smallest - antiferromagnetic materials and the Ni55Cu45 alloy. The squareness parameter was studied as a function of the Curie temperature, Tc.
